demo.title: Book a demo — ZenRIS
demo.description: See ZenRIS live, in your browser: 30 minutes, on your clinic's workflow. Bring your own anonymized DICOM files.
demo.h1: See ZenRIS on your own studies.
demo.lead: 30 minutes, over video, in your browser. We show you the full workflow — from scheduling to signed report and CNAS (Romania's national health insurance house) reimbursement — on your clinic's scenarios.
points_html: Bring your studies. Your own anonymized DICOM files — we follow them through the platform together.
Bring your IT team. We answer architecture and security questions on the spot.
No installs. You get a link. That's it.
demo.mono: The demo runs in your browser. Obviously.
demo.f_msg: What do you want to see in the demo?
demo.f_msg_placeholder: e.g. teleradiology with pools, CNAS reimbursement, patient portal
demo.f_note: We reply the same business day. Form data is used only to schedule your demo.

noutati.title: What's new — ZenRIS
noutati.description: What's new in the ZenRIS platform: releases, features, improvements. A public log of the development.
noutati.h1: A living product leaves a trail.
noutati.lead: This is where we publish what changes in ZenRIS — releases, new features, improvements. No press releases. Just the development log.
noutati.entry_body: The site you are reading right now: one promise — all of radiology, in a single browser — and a demo that proves it. From here on, every notable ZenRIS release lands on this page.
